title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Realistic 3D product showcase for minimal walnut dining table. Split Layout: 4:3 split-view product board; left side shows top-down, side, and front views; right side shows material breakdown. Product Details: tabletop material solid walnut with visible grain and satin finish, leg design angled black powder-coated steel trestle legs, edge detail soft beveled tabletop edge with visible thickness. Spec Modules: Include top thickness, leg angle, wood grain direction, steel finish, and assembly points as clean labels and exploded/detail callouts. Finish Palette: warm walnut, matte black metal, white background, and soft grey shadows, neutral light grey or white presentation background, subtle shadows. Style: High-quality product-design render, precise proportions, realistic materials, clean comparison board. Restrictions: No impossible structure, no missing or warped legs, no unreadable labels, no clutter, no fake logos.
